item.title: Seongho Wins a Award at Polyer Society of Korea Conference
item.description: Seongho has been awarded the Best Presentation Award at the 2026 Korean Polymer Society (PSK) Spring Conference. His presentation was on “A Molecular Dynamics Study: Shock Wave Attenuation and Entanglement between Macromolecular Chains”.

item.title: Awarded 2026 Early Career Research Grant (Type B)
item.description:
Prof. Suwon Bae has been awarded an Early Career Research Grant (Type B) from the National Research Foundation of Korea.

From March 2026 to February 2031, the project titled “Development of a Particle-Based Molecular Dynamics Framework with Explicit Substrates and an Autonomous Experimentation Platform for Optimization of Directed Self-Assembly (DSA) Processes” will develop a particle-based molecular dynamics framework for ultra-fine semiconductor patterning process optimization and elucidate DSA defect control mechanisms.

Grant Information:
Program: Excellence Research – Early Career Research (Type B)
Grant No.: RS-2026-25493211
Title: Development of an Explicit-Substrate Particle-Based Molecular Dynamics Simulation Framework and Autonomous Experimentation Platform for Directed Self-Assembly (DSA) Process Optimization
Period: 2026-03-01 – 2031-02-28

item.title: Seongho's Poster Presentation at KSME Annual Conference
item.description: Seongho presented a poster on “A Molecular Dynamics Study: Shock Wave Attenuation and Entanglement between Macromolecular Chains” at the Korean Society of Mechanical Engineers (KSME) 80th Anniversary Conference.

item.title: Awarded 2025 Global Basic Research Laboratory (BRL) Grant
item.description:
BAE Research Group has been awarded a 2025 Global Basic Research Laboratory (BRL) grant by the National Research Foundation of Korea (PI: Prof. Songkil Kim).

On project titled “2D Material Dynamic Friction Interface Tribology Research Laboratory”, together with the principal investigator Prof. Songkil Kim (School of Mechanical Engineering) and the groups of Prof. Chibum Bahn and Prof. Junho Suh, we will conduct collaborative research from June 1, 2025 to May 31, 2028.

Grant Information:
Program: Global Research Laboratory (Advanced)
Grant No.: RS-2025-02216195
Title: 2D Material Dynamic Friction Interface Tribology Research Laboratory
Period: 2025-06-01 – 2028-05-31

item.title: Group website launched
item.description: We are a research group in the School of Mechanical Engineering at Pusan National University.
